pageContext.name: Himiko Toga (Villain)
pageContext.description: The devious and deadly villain known as Himiko Toga, from the hit series My Hero Academia has joined the Taito Spiritale line as a 1:7 scale figure!  Himiko Toga may be bloodthirsty, but here she is portrayed sitting atop a pile of assorted things she finds cute, like plushies, sweets, and... knives.  This Himiko Toga figure is a perfect addition to any My Hero Academia figure collection!
